'''Yin Wood Pig''' is the 12th of the sixty nodes of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Divine Sixty]], the great cycle that the [[Heavenly stems|heavenly stems]] and [[Earthly Branches|earthly branches]] trace across the ringworld's calendar of [[Gaia]] and [[Luna]].

Its stem is 乙 Kinoto (yin wood, the luna-aligned face of spring), and its branch is 亥 I, the [[Pig (zodiac)|Pig]] hour. Within the [[Wuxing]] reading of the node, the branch's water generates the stem's wood, feeding the heavens from below.

On the [[The divine 60|Divine Sixty]] lattice this position falls between [[Yang Wood Dog]] (node 11) and [[Yang Fire Rat]] (node 13).

== Stem and branch ==
* '''Stem:''' [[Kinoto (乙)]] — yin wood
* '''Branch:''' [[Pig (zodiac)|Pig (亥)]] — yin water
* '''Celestial body:''' [[Luna]]
* '''Element-season:''' spring

== See also ==
* [[The divine 60]]
* [[Sexagenary cycle]]
* [[Heavenly stems]]
* [[Earthly Branches]]
* [[Yang Wood Dog]] — preceding node
* [[Yang Fire Rat]] — following node

{{wikidata link|Q1062067}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Ringworld]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
